description: Introduce a single internal reasoning ingress for agent-facing context assembly while preserving current distributed canonical store ownership.

stories.title: Define the read-only agent context contract
stories.description: Add a thin AgentContextPipeline and request/bundle contract under the ontology layer without changing persistence ownership or MCP tool names.
acceptanceCriteria: A single internal method exists for agent-facing context assembly.
The contract is read-only and introduces no new persistence.
The bundle shape includes facts, evidence, provenance_paths, inferred_links, missing_links, policies, scope, uncertainty, and raw_refs.
notes: Keep the module in the existing ontology/runtime neighborhood.

stories.title: Route ontology_query through the pipeline
stories.description: Refactor query assembly so agent-facing reads consume the pipeline contract while preserving current top-level compatibility.
acceptanceCriteria: ontology_query uses the pipeline-backed context assembly path.
notes: Preserve graph expansion suppression when scope filters are active.

stories.title: Enrich context with provenance, gaps, and policy hints
stories.description: Assemble richer agent-facing context from Ladybug, DuckDB, and Chroma without turning the pipeline into a second truth system.
acceptanceCriteria: The bundle distinguishes confirmed facts, inferred links, and missing links.
Supporting evidence and provenance paths are present when available.
Policy hints are included where relevant to reasoning.
notes: Do not persist assembled context as canonical state.

stories.title: Sync docs, intelligence, and dogfood verification
stories.description: Update canonical docs and repository intelligence so the new cognition-vs-truth boundary is explicit and verified.
acceptanceCriteria: CURRENT_STATE and ARCHITECTURE describe canonical store ownership and derived agent context correctly.
Dogfood and regression checks cover context shape and scope behavior.
notes: Keep documentation drift at zero within the same task.
